hero.body: Full-stack media for brands that want to be remembered. Video, social, copy, and brand identity — all under one roof.

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: End-to-end creative production, so you can focus on building.

video.title: Video Production
video.desc: Brand films, product demos, and testimonials your customers actually watch to the end.

social.title: Social Media
social.desc: Content calendars, short-form video, and community management that keep your feed alive.

copy.title: Copywriting & Voice
copy.desc: Web copy, email campaigns, and messaging that sounds like you — only better.

brand.title: Brand Identity
brand.desc: Logos, style guides, and visual systems that make your brand instantly recognizable.

why.title: Why Skyreal?
why.subtitle: We built the agency we always wished existed.

small.title: We get small brands.
small.desc: No bloated retainers, no templated decks. Just focused creative work built around what you actually need.

honest.title: Radically honest.
honest.desc: We take your brand seriously. Ourselves? Not so much. Expect candid feedback and zero jargon.

partners.title: Partners, not vendors.
partners.desc: We show up invested — because your growth is how we measure ours.

howWeWork.title: How we work
howWeWork.subtitle: Simple by design — because your time is valuable.

discover.title: Discover
discover.desc: We dig into your goals, audience, and what makes you different.

create.title: Create
create.desc: Strategy meets craft. We make things that feel right and perform.

launch.title: Launch
launch.desc: Ship, measure, refine. We stay in the game with you.

courses.title: Online Courses
courses.desc: Learn content strategy, video production, and brand storytelling — taught by the Skyreal team. Self-paced, practical, and made for busy builders.

sponsorship.title: Partner With Us
sponsorship.desc: Get your brand woven into Skyreal content — video mentions, social integration, and co-branded series that reach the right audience authentically.

founder.label: Founder
founder.name: Yuwei Chen
founder.bio: Media builder, storyteller, and firm believer that every brand has a story worth telling well. Yuwei started Skyreal to bring warm, thoughtful creative work to companies that deserve better than generic.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you're building. We'll tell you how we can help.
contact.name: Name

courses.subtitle: Practical, self-paced courses on content strategy, video production, copywriting, and brand design. Built for busy founders and growing teams.

courses.ctaBody: We're always building new curriculum. Tell us what you'd love to learn.

strategy.title: Content Strategy 101
strategy.tagline: Build a content engine that grows your brand on autopilot.
strategy.desc: Learn how to research your audience, build a sustainable content calendar, repurpose assets across channels, and measure what actually matters. Perfect for founders and marketing leads who are tired of guessing.

video.title: Video Production Basics
video.tagline: Create scroll-stopping video with gear you already own.
video.desc: From shot composition to lighting on a budget, to editing a clean final cut — this course walks you through the full video production workflow. No expensive gear required.

copy.title: Brand Voice & Copywriting
copy.tagline: Write words your customers actually want to read.
copy.desc: Discover your brand voice, craft a messaging framework, and write copy that converts — for websites, social media, email, and ads.

social.title: Social Media Mastery
social.tagline: Turn your social channels into a consistent growth engine.
social.desc: Short-form video strategy, hook formulas, posting cadence, community engagement, and how to analyze what's working. Covers Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube Shorts.

brandDesign.title: Brand Identity Design
brandDesign.tagline: Design a brand that looks premium — even on a startup budget.
brandDesign.desc: Logo design principles, color psychology, typography pairing, and how to build a visual identity system that scales. Uses Figma (free tier).

sponsorship.headline1: Get your brand in front of
sponsorship.subtitle: We create content that people actually want to watch and share. Partner with Skyreal and your brand becomes part of that story — naturally, authentically, memorably.
sponsorship.formatsSubtitle: We meet your brand where the audience already is.
sponsorship.formSubtitle: Tell us about your brand and what you're looking to achieve. We'll come back with ideas.
sponsorship.goal: What would you like to achieve?
sponsorship.goalPlaceholder: Tell us about your audience, goals, and the kind of partnership you have in mind...
sponsorship.successBody: We'll review your inquiry and reach out within 2 business days.
sponsorship.error: Something went wrong. Email us directly at hello@skyreal.org

video.title: Video Mentions
video.desc: Your brand naturally woven into our video content — product demos, tutorials, or branded segments. Authentic, never pushy.

social.title: Social Integration
social.desc: Dedicated or co-branded posts across our social channels. Designed to feel native, not like an ad.

series.title: Content Series
series.desc: Sponsor an entire content series — multi-episode video or social campaigns where your brand leads the narrative.

email.title: Email Features
email.desc: Reach our subscriber list with a dedicated mention or sponsored section in our newsletters.

targeted.title: Targeted reach
targeted.desc: Our audience is builders, founders, and brand-curious professionals — not casual scrollers.

authentic.title: Authentic fit
authentic.desc: We only partner with brands we'd actually use and recommend. No random placements.

creative.title: Creative collaboration
creative.desc: You get input on how your brand is presented. No cookie-cutter scripts.
